cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: The Americano order's price is lower than both Greta and the order with the Danish.
Between Macchiato and Scone, one goes with Ava and the other with Hugo.
Scone goes with at most two of Hugo, Cortado, and $13.
$11 goes with at most one of Edith, Chai, and Danish.
Ava goes with either Muffin or $15 (but not both).
Ava goes with Danish if and only if either Macchiato does not go with Muffin or Bagel goes with Mocha (but not both).
Latte goes with exactly two of Edith, Donut, and $9.
Americano goes with Hugo if and only if Chai goes with Scone.
Either $11 goes with Cara or $7 goes with Croissant.
Either Macchiato goes with Croissant, or Bagel goes with $9 — but not both.
Cara, Americano, Scone, and $7 belong to different orders.
Either Danish goes with Hugo or Croissant goes with Mocha.
Croissant goes with exactly one of Greta, Latte, or $9.

kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan with the Anvil's levy is lower than both Rowan and the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
Between Mallet and Saddles, one goes with Aldric and the other with Wulfric.
Saddles goes with at most two of Wulfric, Chisel, and 13 coins.
11 coins goes with at most one of Godfrey, Awl, and Horseshoes.

engineer.name: The Engineering Firm
engineer.description: Each engineer at the firm leads a different project in a different discipline. Work out who's building what.
clues: The Aerospace engineer's budget is lower than both Tesla and the engineer on the Reactor.
Between Robotics and Skyscraper, one goes with Bell and the other with Watt.
Skyscraper goes with at most two of Watt, Civil, and $50k.
$40k goes with at most one of Hertz, Chemical, and Reactor.

Aerospace goes with Watt if and only if Chemical goes with Skyscraper.
Either $40k goes with Edison or $20k goes with Pipeline.
